title: Incident: write a blameless postmortem from notes
task: Convert raw incident notes (with blame-shaped language) into a blameless postmortem with system-shaped action items.
baseline_prompt:
Write a blameless postmortem from these incident notes. Rewrite any blame-shaped language as system-shaped. Produce a timeline, classify action items into prevent / detect / mitigate / process categories, and call out the detection gap between customer-visible impact and the on-call page.
- Sev2: refund worker stuck for 38 minutes on 2026-04-18.
- Carol pushed a hotfix without running migrations; that broke the queue.
- Alice should have caught this in review but missed it.
- On-call paged 12 minutes after customers complained on Slack.
- We restarted the worker and queue drained. No data lost.
- We need to make sure Carol doesn't do this again.
polymath_prompt:
Write a blameless postmortem from these incident notes. Rewrite any blame-shaped language as system-shaped. Produce a timeline, classify action items into prevent / detect / mitigate / process categories, and call out the detection gap between customer-visible impact and the on-call page.
- Sev2: refund worker stuck for 38 minutes on 2026-04-18.
- Carol pushed a hotfix without running migrations; that broke the queue.
- Alice should have caught this in review but missed it.
- On-call paged 12 minutes after customers complained on Slack.
- We restarted the worker and queue drained. No data lost.
- We need to make sure Carol doesn't do this again. Use Polymath's incident postmortem-blameless skill.
